title: gaultheria steenisii
intro: Gaultheria steenisii, also known as the Bornean Gaultheria or mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Borneo and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its high content of essential oils and tannins. Gaultheria steenisii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
